description: As a forestry scientist conducting a timber harvest suitability assessment, create a classified suitability map with at least three categories (suitable, marginal, unsuitable) using the SRTM digital elevation model at /home/ga/snap_data/srtm_dem.tif and Landsat multispectral imagery at /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif (band_1=SWIR1, band_2=NIR, band_3=Red, band_4=Green). The classification must be based on a vegetation vigor index and a terrain steepness metric derived from the co-registered source data. Save the integrated analysis product in BEAM-DIMAP format and export the suitability map as a GeoTIFF to /home/ga/snap_exports/.

metadata.data_source: SRTM DEM + Landsat satellite imagery from github.com/opengeos/data
